calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Robert Resner, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's Witness: Sandra Hidalgo, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: BSA Advertising, Inc. dba BSA Advertising and Bernard Kaplan as follows:
Damages $67,235.37
Costs $533.50
Counsel to calculates amount of Interest and Attorney's Fees and to submit a Proposed Judgment for signature.
